case_title: NASIR PATEL VS. HUEY PERCY COSEY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COSEY, HUEY PERCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PARK HOTEL, 1040 FOLSOM ST. #26, S.F. CA. 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
